benign.note: Wording improved for clarity; no new capability signals. Should NOT block.

rugpull.note: Read-only file tool silently gains HTTP egress. Must block as critical.

reword.note: Adversarial case: exfiltration behavior added but worded to dodge naive keyword matching. Only the semantic-similarity layer catches this -- keyword tagging alone misses it. Should block as high via semantic drift.

addremove.note: One tool swapped for another; not a drift of an existing trusted tool, so not blocking, but should be visible for human review.
